subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! Even as was explicitly promised unto thee, divine confirmations and heavenly assistance have encompassed thee on every side [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد للّه چنانچه بشما وعد صریح شده بود توفیقات الهیّه و تأییدات رحمانیّه از هر جهت احاطه نموده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
